# vector: block_data_capture_frozen
# BLOCK_DATA：Capture Frozen 前缀带 trigger_tick，block 仍为原生布局
# raw  = COBS 编码前帧 (ver|type|flags|seq|len|payload|crc32c, 全 LE)
# wire = COBS(raw) + 0x00 定界符（SCI 链路实际字节）
raw: 55a1000f0028000104000000000000d2040000b0040000090000000300010002000400000000bf000000000000003f75979a30
wire: 0355a1020f0228030104010101010103d2040103b0040102090101020302010202020401010102bf010101010101063f75979a3000
